entries.source: "Ask a teacher for help"
entries.value: "Eskatu laguntza irakasle bati"

entries.source: "Handle a rude customer"
entries.value: "Kudeatu bezero zakar bat"

entries.source: "Negotiate a deadline"
entries.value: "Negoziatu epe bat"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Roleplay Scenario on inspir for immersion learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario inspir-en erabiltzeko gida praktikoa, murgiltze-ikaskuntzarako, promptak, ikasketa-zikloak eta AI ohitura seguruagoak barne.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Ikasketa-ziklo sendoagoa

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Egokitu saioa zure helburura.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI tutorea

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Eskatu lehen urrats txiki bat azken erantzunaren ordez.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari zure arrazoiketa egiaztatzeko, ez emaitza bakarrik.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Amaitu ideia oroimenez berriro idatziz.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: Murgilketa

entries.source: Learners exploring immersion topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Murgilketa-gaiak aztertzen dituzten eta erantzun-kutxa generiko baten ordez gida praktikoa nahi duten ikasleentzat.

entries.source: Practice tough real-life conversations.
entries.value: Praktikatu bizitza errealeko elkarrizketa zailak.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Probatzeko promptak

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario
entries.value: Rol-joko egoera

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: praktikatu negoziazioa, gatazka, bezeroarentzako arreta, lidergoa edo arrisku handiko edozein elkarrizketa.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Start the live mode at Roleplay Scenario. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Career Explorer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Hasi modu bizia Roleplay Scenario-n. Alboko ikaskuntza-formatu bat nahi baduzu, probatu Career Explorer. Plataformaren ikuspegi zabalagorako, irakurri AI ikaskuntza-lagun batek guztientzat zer egin beharko lukeen.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Hasi prompt-adibideekin.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Esan moduari zer ikasi edo ekoitzi nahi duzun.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Alde hori fluxuan agertzen da. Erantzun erraldoi bakarraren ordez, saiorik onenak ziklo batean mugitzen dira: helburua ezarri, zerbait probatu, feedbacka jaso, puntu ahula konpondu eta hurrengo ekintza aukeratu.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Foku horrek axola du. Chatbot orokor batek ia edozeri erantzun diezaioke, baina ikaskuntza-modu batek elkarrizketari forma ematen dio. Ideia itsasten laguntzen duen pentsamendu, praktika, feedback edo esplorazio motara bultzatzen zaitu.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hau da AIarekin zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe ikastearen atzean dagoen ohitura bera: mantendu ikaslea aktibo. AI erabilgarriena da zure pentsamenduari buruzko feedbacka ematen dizunean.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Modu hau bereziki erabilgarria da honako hau nahi duten ikasleentzat:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for roleplay scenario with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Modu hau rol-joko egoeretarako doituta dago, bere prompt, adibide eta ikaskuntza-fluxuekin.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Saiatu urratsa zure hitzekin.

entries.source: Use Roleplay Scenario when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Roleplay Scenario azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Modu honek zertan laguntzen duen

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Nora joan hurrena

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Zure benetako arazoaren bertsio zirriborro batekin ere has zaitezke. Lehen prompt nahasia ondo dago. Saioak maila, audientzia, epea eta estiloa argitu ditzake behin hasten zarenean.
